data.title: Robust Identity and Access Management
data.description: Comprehensive IAM policies ensure that only authorized users have access.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth 2.0, multi-factor authentication, and role-based access control.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Utilizes machine learning for anomaly detection and threat prevention.
data.technical_spec: Real-time analytics with AI-driven decision-making to combat cyber threats.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Adopts a Zero Trust approach to security, ensuring strict least-privilege access.
data.technical_spec: Micro-segmentation, authentication, and encryption enforce security boundaries.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements robust DDoS protection measures to ensure service availability.
data.technical_spec: Cloudflare and in-house solutions handle distributed denial-of-service attacks.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit
data.description: All customer data is encrypted to secure it against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption is used for at-rest data; TLS/SSL for data in transit.
